hero.name: lejxz
hero.description: Computer Science student at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, and Spatial Computing — building the next generation of intelligent AR/VR experiences.

profile.name: Lejuene Delantar
profile.headline: AI | ML | AR/VR
profile.shortBio: Computer Science student working on computer vision, spatial computing, and secure AI systems.
bio: I am a Computer Science student double-majoring in Artificial Intelligence and Cybersecurity. My passion and research are dedicated to Spatial Computing and Computer Vision.

🔭 Current Project: Building a real-time AR detection systems.
🎯 Goal: Contribute to the next generation of intelligent AR/VR experiences.

focusAreas.title: Machine Learning
focusAreas.description: Bayesian Networks, Adversarial ML, and Federated Learning pipelines.

focusAreas.title: Computer Vision
focusAreas.description: OpenCV workflows and low-latency AR object detection with YOLO.

focusAreas.title: AR / VR
focusAreas.description: Spatial overlays, scene awareness, and Vision-AI integration.
